welcome.title: Welcome to Monte da Estrada
paragraphs: Monte da Estrada is a traditional Alentejo farmhouse that has been converted into quality rural tourism, preserving authenticity and contact with nature and the Alentejo region.

For generations, this was a space dedicated to agriculture — wheat, barley, potatoes, corn, and watermelon — and livestock farming. Today, while respecting tradition, we created this place with our guests in mind, prioritizing comfort, privacy, functionality, and contact with nature.
Located in the Zambujeira do Mar region, in the heart of Alentejo, Monte da Estrada offers a unique experience of tranquility and authenticity.
